notes: Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder for power users (a v0 / Lovable / Bolt / Replit alternative), at dyad.sh (GitHub: dyad-sh/dyad). The name is the ordinary English/Greek word "dyad" (from Greek δυάς, "a pair/group of two"), stressed on the first syllable: DY-ad /ˈdaɪæd/, where "dy" is a long-i diphthong like "die." Confirmed by Merriam-Webster, Cambridge, Oxford, and Wiktionary. Non-native devs commonly misread the "dy-" as /diː/ and say "DEE-ad." Official site confirms the name but gives no pronunciation guidance; pronunciation is dictionary-backed.
